name: xboxlive-blade-mcp
title: Xbox Live (Blade)
description: Xbox Live operations — profiles, achievements, friends, presence, game library, SmartGlass console control, Store catalog, messaging
author: groupthink-dev
tagline: Full Xbox Live control — profiles to SmartGlass

highlights.text: Profiles — gamertag, gamerscore, avatar, presence, friends
SmartGlass — power on/off, launch games, console control
Messaging — send Xbox messages to friends
Store — game catalog search and detail lookup
Write-gated — messaging, friends, SmartGlass behind explicit flag

readme:
### What it does

Xbox Live (Blade) gives your AI agent full access to the Xbox Live ecosystem — 22 tools across profiles, achievements, friends, presence, game library, SmartGlass console control, Store catalog, and messaging.

Your agent can check who’s online, compare achievement progress with a friend, browse the Xbox Store, send a message, or power on your console — all from a single conversation.

### Token efficiency

Xbox Live API responses are deeply nested JSON with extensive metadata. Each tool includes a concise formatter that strips pagination wrappers and internal IDs, returning only the fields your agent needs. A typical friends list returns ~150 tokens instead of ~600.

### Safety model

22 tools follow a read-free, write-gated pattern:

- **Reads** work immediately — profiles, achievements, friends, presence, game library, Store
- **Writes** require `XBOX_WRITE_ENABLED=true` — send messages, add/remove friends
- **SmartGlass** power commands are confirm-gated — power on/off requires explicit confirmation

### Contract coverage

Full 17/17 gaming-v1 contract compliance. The only Xbox MCP with SmartGlass, messaging, game clips, and Store catalog support.

scenarios.label: Game night coordination
scenarios.body: Check friends’ online presence, see what games they’re playing, send a message to coordinate, then power on your console via SmartGlass.

scenarios.label: Achievement hunting session
scenarios.body: Compare achievement progress with a friend, identify games where you’re behind, look up game details in the Store, and check recent play history.

scenarios.label: Browse and discover new games
scenarios.body: Search the Xbox Store catalog, check game details and ratings, see which friends own or have played a title, and review achievement lists before purchasing.

env.name: XBOX_CLIENT_SECRET
env.description: Azure App client secret (optional for public clients)

env.name: XBOX_WRITE_ENABLED
env.description: Enable write operations (messaging, friend management, SmartGlass)

setup.blurb: Full Xbox Live access — profiles, achievements, friends, presence, game library, SmartGlass console control, Store catalog, and messaging. 22 tools, 17/17 gaming-v1 contract coverage.
setup.help_text: Register an Azure app at portal.azure.com with Xbox Live API scope, then run 'xboxlive-blade-mcp auth' for one-time browser login. Tokens auto-refresh after initial setup.

fields.label: Azure App Client ID
fields.help: Application (client) ID from Azure App registrations

fields.label: Enable Write Operations
fields.help: Messaging, friend management, SmartGlass console commands

certification.security_notes: OAuth2 via Azure AD. Write gates on messaging, friend management, and SmartGlass power commands. Confirm gates on destructive console operations.

notes: Full-featured Xbox Live MCP built on xbox-webapi-python (200+ stars). 22 tools across 8 domains. The only MCP with SmartGlass console control, Xbox messaging, game clips, and Store catalog. Write gates on mutations, confirm gates on SmartGlass power commands and friend removal. Token-efficient pipe-delimited output.
